content.query:
-------------------------------- Hor to Query Subset of Columns -------------------------------------
use nyc_taxi_discovery;

SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://nyc-taxi-data@datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    )
    WITH(
        Borough VARCHAR(15),
        Zone VARCHAR(50)
    ) AS [result];

SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://nyc-taxi-data@datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/taxi_zone_without_header.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = ',',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '\n'
    )
    WITH(
        Borough VARCHAR(15) 2,             --- use ordinal positions to map column names correctly with the columns with no headers
        Zone VARCHAR(50) 3
    ) AS [result];

SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://nyc-taxi-data@datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    )
    WITH(
        Location_id SMALLINT,  --- case sensitivity of the column name changed - we get null values
        borough VARCHAR(15),   --- case sensitivity of the column name changed - we get null values
        Zone VARCHAR(50),
        service_zone VARCHAR(15)
    ) AS [result];

---- If we assign ordinal position then we will get correct values even with different case-sensitivity column names
SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://nyc-taxi-data@datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    )
    WITH(
        Location_id SMALLINT 1,  
        borough VARCHAR(15) 2,   
        zone VARCHAR(50) 3,
        service_zone VARCHAR(15) 4
    ) AS [result];

----------------------------------- HOW TO DEBUG ISSUES --------------------------------------

SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://nyc-taxi-data@datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    )
    WITH(
        Location_id SMALLINT 1,  
        borough VARCHAR(15) 2,   
        zone VARCHAR(5) 3,                --- MOST OF THE TIME, WE GIVE INCORRECT DATA TYPES. HERE INSTEAD OF 50 WE HAVE GIVEN VARCHAR(5). ERROR MESSAGE IS VERY GENERIC 
        service_zone VARCHAR(15) 4
    ) AS [result];

SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://nyc-taxi-data@datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '1.0',  --- WE SWITCHED TO VERSION 1.0 -- ERROR IS MORE SPECIFIC
        FIRSTROW = 2
    )
    WITH(
        LocationID SMALLINT,
        Borough VARCHAR(15),
        Zone VARCHAR(5),              
        service_zone VARCHAR(15) 4
    ) AS [result];

---------------------------- HOW TO USE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE --------------------------------------
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE nyc_taxi_data
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'abfss://nyc-taxi-data@datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/'
);

SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        FIRSTROW = 2
    )
    WITH(
        Location_id SMALLINT 1,  
        borough VARCHAR(15) 2,   
        zone VARCHAR(50) 3,               
        service_zone VARCHAR(15) 4
    ) AS [result];

SELECT name, location from sys.external_data_sources;
